summary: Comprehensive testing of paper reading web app with AI-powered contextual word lookup completed. All backend APIs working perfectly (11/11 tests passed). Frontend features tested successfully including paper reader, word lookup with AI explanations, caching system with Instant badges, bookmark functionality, and navigation.
passed_tests: Word lookup with AI explanations (Gemini 3 Flash)
Frontend homepage loading with Context Lens logo
Paper list display with proper typography
Paper reader with white surface on off-white background
Side panel with frosted glass effect
AI explanation display with context snippets
Navigation between home, reader, and bookmarks pages
Paper deletion with hover-to-reveal trash icon
Responsive design with Jony Ive minimalism
Typography: Newsreader serif for reading, Manrope for UI
